Combined Refactor Plan — Backend + Frontend

Purpose: Module-by-module migration plan. Each phase covers one module — backend legacy, frontend legacy, what's broken, current vs target flow, prerequisites, and an execution checklist.

Backend source of truth: server/.github/refactor-plan.md
Frontend codebase: ui/src/app/

Principle: When starting a module, only migrate what that module needs. Don't migrate all of socket — only the chat socket events when doing chat. Don't migrate all shared utils — only what leads needs when doing leads.

Table of Contents

  1. Phase 0 — Shared Foundation
  2. Phase 1 — Auth (✅ Done)
  3. Phase 2 — Chat
  4. Phase 3 — Notifications
  5. Phase 4 — Leads (CRM)
  6. Phase 5 — Projects & Tasks
  7. Phase 6 — Calendar & Meetings
  8. Phase 7 — Contracts
  9. Phase 8 — Finance / Accountant
  10. Phase 9 — Users & Admin
  11. Phase 10 — Dashboard
  12. Phase 11 — Image Sessions
  13. Phase 12 — Courses
  14. Phase 13 — Small Modules
  15. Phase 14 — Cleanup & Cutover
  16. Master Checklist

Progress Dashboard

Phase Module Backend Frontend Status
0 Shared Foundation ⬜ ⬜ Not started
1 Auth ✅ ✅ Done
2 Chat ⬜ ⬜ Not started
3 Notifications ⬜ ⬜ Not started
4 Leads (CRM) ⬜ ⬜ Not started
5 Projects & Tasks ⬜ ⬜ Not started
6 Calendar & Meetings ⬜ ⬜ Not started
7 Contracts ⬜ ⬜ Not started
8 Finance / Accountant ⬜ ⬜ Not started
9 Users & Admin ⬜ ⬜ Not started
10 Dashboard ⬜ ⬜ Not started
11 Image Sessions ⬜ ⬜ Not started
12 Courses ⬜ ⬜ Not started
13 Small Modules ⬜ ⬜ Not started
14 Cleanup & Cutover ⬜ ⬜ Not started

Phase 0 — Shared Foundation

Everything else depends on this. Build the shared infrastructure both backend and frontend need.

What needs to exist before any module

Backend shared infra

  • v2/shared/pagination.js — extract getPagination() from services/main/utility/utility.js
  • v2/shared/enums.js — move from services/enums.js
  • v2/shared/links.js — move from services/links.js
  • v2/shared/constants.js — move from services/constants.js
  • v2/infra/redis/redis.js + bullmq-connection.js — move from services/redis/
  • Extend v2/shared/middlewares/auth.middleware.js with getCurrentUser() + getTokenData()
  • Route mounting strategy: v2 routes coexist with legacy in index.js

Frontend shared infra

  • v2/lib/api/ApiFetch.js — ✅ exists
  • v2/lib/api/getData.js — ✅ exists
  • v2/lib/api/handleRequestSubmit.js — ✅ exists
  • v2/lib/config.js — ✅ exists
  • v2/lib/toast/toastUtils.js — ✅ exists

Backend Checklist

  • Create v2/shared/pagination.js
  • Move services/enums.js → v2/shared/enums.js
  • Move services/links.js → v2/shared/links.js
  • Move services/constants.js → v2/shared/constants.js
  • Create v2/infra/redis/redis.js and bullmq-connection.js
  • Extend v2/shared/middlewares/auth.middleware.js
  • Establish route mounting strategy in v2/routes.js
  • Verify auth v1↔v2 cookie compatibility

Frontend Checklist

  • Verify ApiFetch.js handles both /v2/ and legacy prefixes
  • Ensure getData.js supports same pagination/filter/search/sort params
  • Create shared v2/shared/hooks/useDataFetcher.js
  • Create shared v2/shared/components/AdminTable.jsx or adapter
  • Verify v2/providers/AuthProvider.jsx works with v2 endpoints
  • Verify v2/providers/ToastProvider.jsx matches legacy behavior

Phase 1 — Auth Done

Backend ✅

  • ✅ Fully refactored in v2/modules/auth/ (8 files)
  • ✅ Endpoints: login, refresh, logout, me, request-password-reset, reset-password
  • ✅ Zod validation, rate limiting, timing-safe auth, refresh token rotation

Frontend ✅

  • ✅ v2/module/auth/ — LoginPage, ResetPage, services, validation
  • ✅ v2/shared/form/AuthForm.jsx, FormField.jsx
  • ✅ v2/shared/components/AuthCard.jsx, AuthGuard.jsx, AuthLayout.jsx
  • ✅ v2/providers/AuthProvider.jsx

Remaining cleanup

  • Confirm all frontend pages switched from /auth/* to /v2/auth/*
  • Remove legacy services/main/auth/authServices.js after confirming
  • Remove legacy routes/auth/auth.js after confirming
  • Remove legacy src/app/(auth)/(auth-group)/login/ and reset/ pages if fully replaced

Phase 2 — Chat Not started

Complex, standalone, already scaffolded in backend. Heavy socket usage. This is the most complex module.

⚠ Prerequisites — do these BEFORE chat

Socket infra (only chat-related parts):

The current services/socket.js (~580 lines) is a monolith. For chat, only extract chat events.

  • Create v2/infra/socket/socket.js — Socket.IO init + namespaces
  • Create v2/infra/socket/chat.events.js — extract chat events: message:create, message:edit, message:delete, message:pin, message:unpin, messages:forward, messages:mark_read, join_room, leave_room, user:typing, user:stop_typing, message:react
  • Create v2/infra/socket/presence.events.js — extract: online, offline
  • Leave call events in legacy for now
  • Add Zod validation for socket event payloads
  • Add socket error handling wrapper

Upload infra (only what chat needs):

  • Create v2/infra/upload/chunk-upload.js
  • Create v2/infra/upload/multer.js
Backend Legacy — What exists and what's wrong
Route files (8):
  • routes/chat/rooms.js — staff room CRUD
  • routes/chat/messages.js — staff message CRUD
  • routes/chat/members.js — staff member management
  • routes/chat/files.js — staff file listing
  • routes/client/chat/rooms.js — client room access (token-based)
  • routes/client/chat/messages.js — client messages
  • routes/client/chat/members.js — client members
  • routes/client/chat/files.js — client files
Service files (5, ~1,100 lines):
  • chatRoomServices.js (~300 lines)
  • chatMessageServices.js (~400 lines)
  • chatMemberServices.js (~150 lines)
  • chatFileServices.js (~150 lines)
  • utils.js (~100 lines)
What's bad:
  1. Socket handlers have direct Prisma queries — business logic in socket layer
  2. sendMessage() calls emitToAllUsersRelatedToARoom() — socket emit INSIDE service
  3. Message creation duplicated between socket handlers and chat services
  4. Client chat has no real auth — relies on token in query params
  5. Room permission checks scattered across utils.js + inline in services
  6. Day grouping / date formatting mixed into message queries

Current Flow vs Target Flow

❌ Current (bad)
Client → Socket.IO "message:create"
  → services/socket.js handler
    → chatMessageServices.sendMessage()
      → Direct Prisma in service
      → emitToAllUsersRelatedToARoom()  ← emit inside service!
    → telegramMessageQueue.add()        ← inside socket handler
✅ Target (clean)
Client → Socket.IO "message:create"
  → v2/infra/socket/chat.events.js
    → chat.usecase.sendMessage(payload)
      → chat.repo.createMessage()       ← Prisma only in repo
      → returns created message
    → socket.emit()                     ← emit in socket layer
    → telegram queue (if needed)
Frontend Legacy — What exists (30+ components, 6 hooks)
Page routes (5):
  • src/app/chats/page.jsx — client chat
  • @2D/chat/page.jsx, @3D/chat/page.jsx, @super_admin/chat/page.jsx, @super_sales/chat/page.jsx
Components (30+) in UiComponents/DataViewer/chat/:
  • ChatContainer.jsx — main layout (page/widget/project modes)
  • ChatPage.jsx, ChatWidget.jsx, ClientChatPage.jsx
  • ChatWindow.jsx, ChatInput.jsx, ChatMessage.jsx
  • ChatRoomsList.jsx, ChatFilesTab.jsx, MultiActions.jsx
  • CreateGroupDialog.jsx, StartNewChat.jsx, AddMembersDialog.jsx, ForwardMessagesDialog.jsx
  • ChatSettings.jsx, PinnedMessages.jsx
Hooks (6):
  • useChatRooms.js, useChatMessages.js, useChatMembers.js, useChatFiles.js, useChatRoom.js, useSocket.js
Endpoints consumed:
  • shared/chat/rooms — CRUD + lead-rooms
  • shared/chat/rooms/:roomId/messages — messages
  • shared/chat/rooms/:roomId/members — members
  • shared/chat/rooms/:roomId/files — files
  • client/chat/rooms/* — client access
  • utility/upload-chunk — file uploads

Backend Checklist

  • chat.repo.js — extract Prisma from 5 legacy services
  • chat.dto.js — select fields + day grouping
  • chat.usecase.js — room/message/member ops + permissions
  • chat.validation.js — Zod schemas
  • chat.controller.js — thin HTTP handlers
  • chat.routes.js — merge rooms/messages/members/files
  • chat.middleware.js — room membership check
  • client-chat.routes.js + client-chat.controller.js
  • Wire chat.events.js → chat.usecase (not Prisma)
  • Remove emitToAllUsersRelatedToARoom() from services
  • Mount chat routes in v2/routes.js

Frontend Checklist

  • Create v2/module/chat/ folder structure
  • Move hooks → v2/module/chat/hooks/
  • Move utils → v2/module/chat/utils/
  • Move all chat components → v2/module/chat/components/
  • Update hooks to use v2/lib/api/
  • Update endpoints: shared/chat/* → v2/chat/*
  • Update client endpoints: client/chat/* → v2/chat/client/*
  • Update upload endpoint if changed
  • Verify socket event names align with v2
  • Update all dashboard chat page imports
  • Test: room CRUD, messages, files, typing, members, client access

Dependencies: Socket infra (prerequisite), Upload infra (prerequisite), Auth ✅

Phase 3 — Notifications Not started

Most modules depend on notifications. Build this early so other modules can use notifications.usecase.createNotification().

⚠ Prerequisites
  • Phase 0 shared foundation must be done
Backend Legacy — scattered across 3 places
  • services/main/utility/utility.js → createNotification() — in the god file
  • services/notification.js → lead-specific notifications
  • services/main/email/emailTemplates.js → HTML email templates
What's bad:
  1. createNotification() in utility god file — called from 10+ services
  2. Notification types are inline strings, not centralized
  3. Socket emit coupled to createNotification()

Current Flow vs Target Flow

❌ Current
Any service → utility.createNotification()
  → Prisma create notification
  → io.to(`user:${userId}`).emit("notification")
    ← Socket emit inside utility!
✅ Target
Any usecase → notifications.usecase.create(payload)
  → notifications.repo.create()
  → returns notification
  → caller handles socket emit

Backend Checklist

  • notifications.repo.js — CRUD, unread count, mark-read
  • notifications.usecase.js — centralized createNotification()
  • notifications.emails.js — consolidate email templates
  • notifications.routes.js — GET unread, POST mark-read
  • notifications.controller.js
  • notifications.validation.js
  • Define notification type enum/constants
  • Mount in v2/routes.js

Frontend Checklist

  • Create v2/module/notifications/
  • Move Logs.jsx → v2/module/notifications/
  • Update endpoint: shared/utilities/notifications → v2/notifications
  • Update notification constants/colors
  • Update socket listeners if event shape changes
  • Update dashboard pages that import Logs

Dependencies: Socket.IO infra (for real-time delivery), Mail infra (✅ exists)

Phase 4 — Leads (CRM) Not started

Core business module. Most other modules depend on leads. ~55 frontend files.

⚠ Prerequisites
  • Phase 3 (Notifications) — leads create assignment/conversion notifications
  • Shared upload infra (if not done in Phase 2)
Backend Legacy — 3 route files, 4 service files
  • routes/shared/client-leads.js (~150 lines) — staff lead CRUD
  • routes/client/leads.js (~200 lines, FAT) — public lead creation with inline business logic
  • Part of routes/admin/admin.js — Excel lead import
What's bad:
  1. routes/client/leads.js has inline: price range mapping, consultation pricing, code gen, date handling, direct Prisma
  2. Notes, payments, reminders, price offers all mixed into leads route
  3. Lead creation in admin uses different logic than client self-register

Current Flow vs Target Flow

❌ Current
Client → POST /client/leads (register)
  → routes/client/leads.js
    → Inline price calc, code gen, date logic
    → Direct Prisma create
    → Notification + telegram channel
✅ Target
Client → POST /v2/leads/client/register
  → client-leads.controller.js
    → leads.usecase.createClientLead(data)
      → leads.repo.create()
      → notifications.usecase.notify()
      → returns lead
Frontend Legacy — 55+ files across 11 subdirectories
  • Pages (4): AllDealsPage, NewLeadsPage, NonConsultedLeads, OnHoldLeads
  • Features (2): PreviewLead, AddNewLead
  • Dialogs (7): PriceOffers, Notes, Meetings, Calls, Files, PaymentSchedule, BulkConvert
  • Tabs (9): SalesStage, PriceOffers, MeetingReminders, CallReminders, Notes, Files, SalesTools, Chats, Extra
  • Widgets (6): Dashboard metric widgets
  • Panels (3): Info panels
  • Core (8): Display utilities, column definitions
  • Kanban (11): KanbanColumn, KanbanLeadCard, BulkConvertModal, etc.
  • Client: ClientPage.jsx, FinalSelectionForm.jsx

Backend Checklist

  • leads.repo.js — extract from leadServices
  • leads.usecase.js — creation, code gen, price calc, assignment, conversion
  • leads.dto.js — select fields for list/detail
  • leads.validation.js — Zod schemas
  • leads.controller.js + leads.routes.js
  • leads.emails.js
  • client-leads.routes.js + client-leads.controller.js
  • Move noteServices → leads.repo sub-ops
  • Extract admin lead import → leads.usecase
  • Mount in v2/routes.js

Frontend Checklist

  • Create v2/module/leads/ folder structure
  • Move DataViewer/leads/* → v2/module/leads/
  • Move DataViewer/Kanban/ → v2/module/leads/kanban/
  • Move client-page/ → v2/module/leads/client/
  • Update all useDataFetcher + getData calls → v2 API
  • Update endpoints: shared/client-leads/* → v2/leads/*
  • Update all dashboard page route imports
  • Test: lead CRUD, assignment, conversion, kanban, notes, meetings, calls, files, price offers, bulk convert

Dependencies: Notifications (Phase 3), Calendar (Phase 6 — can use legacy temporarily), Finance (Phase 8 — can use legacy temporarily)

Phase 5 — Projects & Tasks Not started

Depend on leads and contracts. Projects are created from contracts.

⚠ Prerequisites
  • Phase 4 (Leads) — projects linked to leads
  • Contracts don't need to be done yet — can reference legacy

Backend Checklist

  • v2/modules/projects/ — repo, usecase, dto, validation, controller, routes
  • v2/modules/tasks/ — repo, usecase, validation, controller, routes
  • Move role-based filtering from route → usecase
  • Decouple project creation from contract service
  • Mount in v2/routes.js

Frontend Checklist

  • Create v2/module/projects/ — move work-stages/projects/*
  • Create v2/module/tasks/ — move DataViewer/tasks/*
  • Move WorkStageKanban, PreviewWorkStage, ProjectDeliverySchedule
  • Update endpoints: shared/projects/* → v2/projects/*
  • Update shared/tasks/* → v2/tasks/*
  • Test: project list, detail, assignment, tasks CRUD, kanban, delivery

Dependencies: Leads (Phase 4), Contracts (Phase 7 — can use legacy), Notifications (Phase 3)

Phase 6 — Calendar & Meetings Not started

Public booking, staff calendar, Google Calendar integration.

⚠ Prerequisites
  • Phase 0 shared foundation
Backend Legacy — 5 route files (messy!)
  • routes/calendar/calendar.js (~80 lines)
  • routes/calendar/new-calendar.js (~250 lines) — service file in routes folder!
  • routes/calendar/client-calendar.js (~90 lines) — public booking
  • routes/calendar/google.js (~100 lines) — Google Calendar OAuth
  • routes/calendar/old-call.js (~60 lines) — legacy, likely unused
What's bad:
  1. new-calendar.js is a SERVICE file in the ROUTES folder
  2. old-call.js is dead code still mounted
  3. Call/meeting reminders are in staffServices.js, not calendar

Backend Checklist

  • v2/modules/calendar/ — repo, usecase, validation, controller, routes
  • Move new-calendar.js logic → calendar.usecase.js
  • Consolidate Google Calendar OAuth
  • Create calendar/client/ — public booking
  • Move reminders from staffServices.js → calendar.usecase.js
  • Delete old-call.js
  • Mount in v2/routes.js

Frontend Checklist

  • Create v2/module/calendar/ — move meeting/calendar/*
  • Create v2/module/questions/ — move SPAIN + VERSA
  • Update booking page to import from v2
  • Update endpoints: client/calendar/* → v2/calendar/client/*
  • Update shared/calendar-management/* → v2/calendar/*
  • Delete Old-cal.jsx
  • Test: public booking, admin calendar, slots, SPAIN/VERSA

Dependencies: Leads (reminders linked), Google OAuth

Phase 7 — Contracts Not started

Complex module with PDF generation. Depends on leads, creates projects.

⚠ Prerequisites
  • Phase 4 (Leads) — contracts linked to leads
  • v2/infra/pdf/pdf-utils.js — move from services/utilityServices.js
  • PDF queue must work with v2

Backend Checklist

  • v2/modules/contracts/ — repo, usecase, dto, validation, controller, routes
  • contracts.pdf.js — move 500+ lines PDF generation
  • Merge rules.js, wittenBlocksData.js, generateDefaultContractData.js → contracts.dto.js
  • Decouple contract creation from project creation + telegram
  • Create contracts/client/ — public signing
  • v2/infra/pdf/pdf-utils.js
  • Mount in v2/routes.js

Frontend Checklist

  • Create v2/module/contracts/ — move DataViewer/contracts/*
  • Move contracts/client/, shared/, payments/ subdirs
  • Update endpoints: shared/contracts/* → v2/contracts/*
  • Update client: client/contracts/* → v2/contracts/client/*
  • Update site-utilities: → v2/site-config/*
  • Test: CRUD, PDF, payments, client signing, clone

Dependencies: Leads (Phase 4), Projects (Phase 5), Site Config, PDF queue

Phase 8 — Finance / Accountant Not started

Payments, salaries, rents, expenses. Depends on leads and contracts.

⚠ Prerequisites
  • Phase 4 (Leads) — payments linked to leads
  • Phase 7 (Contracts) — payment conditions from contracts

Backend Checklist

  • v2/modules/finance/ — repo, usecase, dto, validation, controller, routes
  • finance/stripe.js — consolidate Stripe
  • finance/client/ — public Stripe checkout
  • Extract admin commission → finance.usecase
  • Mount in v2/routes.js

Frontend Checklist

  • Create v2/module/finance/ — move DataViewer/accountant/*
  • Move Kanban/accountant/ → v2/module/finance/kanban/
  • Update endpoints: accountant/* → v2/finance/*
  • Update all dashboard accountant pages
  • Test: payments, salaries, rents, expenses, kanban, overdue

Dependencies: Leads (Phase 4), Contracts (Phase 7), Notifications (Phase 3), Stripe SDK

Phase 9 — Users & Admin Not started

Admin user management. The admin route is a monolith that needs decomposition.

Backend Checklist

  • v2/modules/users/ — repo, usecase, dto, validation, controller, routes
  • v2/modules/profile/ — repo, usecase, controller, routes
  • Distribute admin actions to domain modules
  • Move staffServices logic to calendar/leads modules
  • Delete routes/staff/staff.js after redistribution
  • Mount in v2/routes.js

Frontend Checklist

  • Create v2/module/users/ — move DataViewer/users/*
  • Move pages/UsersPage.jsx → v2/module/users/
  • Move Commission.jsx → v2/module/finance/
  • Update endpoints: admin/users/* → v2/users/*
  • Test: user CRUD, roles, auto-assignments, restricted countries

Dependencies: Auth ✅, Domain modules for distributed admin actions

Phase 10 — Dashboard Not started

Analytics and KPIs. Depends on data from most modules.

Backend Checklist

  • v2/modules/dashboard/ — repo, usecase, controller, routes
  • Move staff filtering from controller → usecase
  • Mount in v2/routes.js

Frontend Checklist

  • Create v2/module/dashboard/ — move DataViewer/dashbaord/* (fix typo!)
  • Update endpoints: shared/dashboard/* → v2/dashboard/*
  • Update all role-based dashboard pages
  • Test: all views per role (admin, staff, designer, accountant)

Dependencies: All CRM modules (provides data for KPIs)

Phase 11 — Image Sessions Not started

Design image management. Client-facing gallery + admin management.

Backend Checklist

  • v2/modules/image-sessions/ — repo, usecase, validation, controller, routes
  • image-sessions.pdf.js — move PDF gen from clientServices
  • Create image-sessions/client/ — public session
  • Mount in v2/routes.js

Frontend Checklist

  • Create v2/module/image-sessions/ — move DataViewer/image-session/*
  • Update endpoints: admin/image-session/* → v2/image-sessions/*
  • Update client: client/image-session/* → v2/image-sessions/client/*
  • Test: admin gallery, client selection, PDF generation

Dependencies: Leads (Phase 4), PDF queue/worker

Phase 12 — Courses Not started

Backend Checklist

  • v2/modules/courses/ — repo, usecase, dto, validation, controller, routes
  • Merge admin + staff logic with role-based middleware
  • Mount in v2/routes.js

Frontend Checklist

  • Create v2/module/courses/ — move course components
  • Update endpoints
  • Test: course CRUD, lessons, tests, homework

Phase 13 — Small Modules Not started

Questions/VERSA, Sales Stages, Updates, Delivery, Profile, Google Reviews, Site Config, Drive/Uploads. Small modules batched together.

Module Backend Frontend Notes
Questions / VERSA v2/modules/questions/ Verify v2/module/questions/ from Phase 6 May already be covered by Calendar phase
Sales Stages v2/modules/sales-stages/ Update endpoint in leads SalesStage tab Tiny — 35 line route, 45 line service
Updates v2/modules/updates/ Update endpoint in leads update tabs Part of leads module functionally
Delivery v2/modules/delivery/ Update endpoint in delivery schedule Moved with Projects in Phase 5
Profile v2/modules/profile/ Update endpoint in ProfileDialog 25 line route, 15 line service
Google Reviews v2/infra/google/reviews.js Update endpoint if consumed 30 line route, 50 line service
Site Config v2/modules/site-config/ Update shared/site-utilities/* → v2/site-config/* Contract utility pages
Drive / Uploads v2/modules/drive/ + v2/infra/upload/ Move uploadAsChunk.js → v2/lib/upload/ May be partially done in Phase 2

Phase 14 — Cleanup & Cutover Not started

Remove all legacy code. Switch entry points.

Backend

  • Update index.js or replace with v2/server.js
  • Remove all legacy routes/ files
  • Remove all legacy services/ files
  • Remove root-level schedulers
  • Remove prisma/prisma.js
  • Final route URL audit
  • Update deployment scripts

Frontend

  • Remove all UiComponents/DataViewer/ components
  • Remove legacy helpers/functions/
  • Remove legacy helpers/hooks/useDataFetcher.js
  • Remove legacy providers/ with v2 replacements
  • Remove UiComponents/client-page/
  • Remove legacy formComponents/ with v2 replacements
  • Verify all pages import from v2/module/*
  • Final regression test across all roles
  • Verify RTL/Arabic in all migrated components

Master Checklist

Foundation

  • Backend shared infra (Phase 0)
  • Frontend shared infra (Phase 0)
  • Auth verified (Phase 1 ✅)

Modules (in dependency order)

  • Chat — backend + socket extraction + frontend (Phase 2)
  • Notifications — backend + frontend (Phase 3)
  • Leads — backend + frontend (Phase 4)
  • Projects & Tasks — backend + frontend (Phase 5)
  • Calendar & Meetings — backend + frontend (Phase 6)
  • Contracts — backend + frontend (Phase 7)
  • Finance / Accountant — backend + frontend (Phase 8)
  • Users & Admin — backend + frontend (Phase 9)
  • Dashboard — backend + frontend (Phase 10)
  • Image Sessions — backend + frontend (Phase 11)
  • Courses — backend + frontend (Phase 12)
  • Small modules batch (Phase 13)

Cleanup

  • Remove all legacy backend code (Phase 14)
  • Remove all legacy frontend code (Phase 14)
  • Final regression test (Phase 14)
  • Update deployment (Phase 14)

Dependency Graph

Auth (✅ done) └── Everything depends on auth Phase 0: Shared Foundation └── Everything depends on this Phase 2: Chat (standalone, needs socket extraction for chat only) Phase 3: Notifications (standalone, needed by most modules) Phase 4: Leads ← depends on Notifications Phase 5: Projects & Tasks ← depends on Leads Phase 6: Calendar ← can be parallel with Phase 5 Phase 7: Contracts ← depends on Leads Phase 8: Finance ← depends on Leads, Contracts Phase 9: Users ← depends on domain modules being done Phase 10: Dashboard ← depends on most modules Phase 11-13: Can happen in any order after Phase 4 Phase 14: After everything else

URL Migration Reference

Old URL New URL Module
/auth/* /v2/auth/* ✅ Auth
/shared/chat/* /v2/chat/* Chat
/client/chat/* /v2/chat/client/* Chat
/shared/client-leads/* /v2/leads/* Leads
/client/leads/* /v2/leads/client/* Leads
/shared/projects/* /v2/projects/* Projects
/shared/tasks/* /v2/tasks/* Tasks
/shared/calendar-management/* /v2/calendar/* Calendar
/client/calendar/* /v2/calendar/client/* Calendar
/shared/contracts/* /v2/contracts/* Contracts
/client/contracts/* /v2/contracts/client/* Contracts
/accountant/* /v2/finance/* Finance
/client/payments/* /v2/finance/client/* Finance
/admin/users/* /v2/users/* Users
/shared/dashboard/* /v2/dashboard/* Dashboard
/shared/image-session/* /v2/image-sessions/* Image Sessions
/client/image-session/* /v2/image-sessions/client/* Image Sessions
/admin/courses/* /v2/courses/* Courses
/shared/questions/* /v2/questions/* Questions
/shared/utilities/notifications /v2/notifications Notifications
/utility/upload-chunk /v2/drive/upload-chunk Drive
/shared/delivery/* /v2/delivery/* Delivery
/shared/sales-stages/* /v2/sales-stages/* Sales Stages
/shared/site-utilities/* /v2/site-config/* Site Config

Frontend Old → New File Index

Old Location New Location Phase
UiComponents/DataViewer/chat/ v2/module/chat/ 2
providers/SocketProvider.jsx v2/providers/SocketProvider.jsx (or keep) 2
UiComponents/DataViewer/Logs.jsx v2/module/notifications/ 3
UiComponents/DataViewer/leads/ v2/module/leads/ 4
